# 📋 Public Directory Structure

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Do NOT Delete This Directory!

The `public/` directory serves multiple critical purposes:

1. **Build Output Target** - Frontend builds TO this directory
2. **User Content Storage** - Contains uploads, emojis, plugins
3. **Static File Serving** - Backend serves files from here
4. **Docker Mount Point** - Mounted in containers

---

## 🗂️ Directory Structure

### Generated by Build (Ignored by Git)
```
public/
├── index.html      # Svelte app entry point (generated)
├── manifest.json   # PWA manifest (generated)
└── assets/         # JS/CSS bundles (generated)
    ├── index-[hash].js
    ├── index-[hash].css
    └── ...
```

### User Content (Preserved & Tracked)
```
public/
├── emojis/         # Custom emoji files
├── plugins/        # Plugin files
├── sounds/         # Audio files
├── img/            # Images and icons
└── uploads/        # User-uploaded files
```

---

## 🧹 Cleaning Old Files

Before building the Svelte frontend for the first time, clean out old HTML/JS/CSS files:

```bash
# Recommended: Use the cleanup script
./scripts/clean-old-frontend.sh

# This removes:
# - Old HTML files (index.html, home.html, voip.html)
# - Old JavaScript (js/, *.js)
# - Old CSS (css/, *.css)
# - Old page directories (settings/, testing/, etc.)
#
# While preserving:
# - emojis/
# - plugins/
# - sounds/
# - img/
# - uploads/
```

---

## 📦 What Gets Built Here

When you run `npm run build` in the `frontend/` directory:

```bash
cd frontend
npm run build

# Output:
# ✅ public/index.html (created)
# ✅ public/assets/index-[hash].js (created)
# ✅ public/assets/index-[hash].css (created)
# ✅ public/manifest.json (created)
#
# Preserved:
# ✓ public/emojis/
# ✓ public/plugins/
# ✓ public/sounds/
# ✓ public/img/
# ✓ public/uploads/
```

---

## 🔒 Git Configuration

The `.gitignore` file in this directory ensures:
- ✅ Build output is NOT committed (index.html, assets/, etc.)
- ✅ User content IS preserved (emojis/, uploads/, etc.)

---

## 🚀 Deployment

### Development
```bash
# Frontend dev server proxies to backend
cd frontend && npm run dev
# Serves from: http://localhost:3000
```

### Production
```bash
# Build frontend
cd frontend && npm run build

# Start backend (serves public/)
npm start
# Serves from: http://localhost:2052
```

### Docker
```bash
# Mounts ./public:/app/public
docker-compose up
```

---

## ⚠️ Common Mistakes

### ❌ DON'T DO THIS:
```bash
rm -rf public/                    # Deletes user content!
rm -rf public/uploads/             # Loses user uploads!
git rm -r public/                  # Breaks the application!
```

### ✅ DO THIS INSTEAD:
```bash
./scripts/clean-old-frontend.sh   # Clean old files only
cd frontend && npm run build       # Build new frontend
```

---

## 📝 Maintenance

### Check what's in public/
```bash
ls -la public/
```

### Check build output exists
```bash
test -f public/index.html && echo "✅ Built" || echo "❌ Not built"
```

### Check user content exists
```bash
ls -d public/emojis public/uploads public/plugins 2>/dev/null
```

### Clean and rebuild
```bash
./scripts/clean-old-frontend.sh
cd frontend && npm run build
```

---

## 🆘 Recovery

If you accidentally delete content:

### Restore from backup
```bash
# If you ran clean-old-frontend.sh
mv public_backup_*/* public/

# If you have other backups
cp -r /path/to/backup/public/* public/
```

### Rebuild frontend
```bash
cd frontend
npm run build
```

### Restore from git (user content only)
```bash
# User content should be in git
git checkout public/emojis
git checkout public/plugins
git checkout public/sounds
```

---
